assertions.text: No let or const in JS block — ES5 only
assertions.evidence: All declarations use var; no let/const found
Both calls chain withSuccessHandler then withFailureHandler before the function call

assertions.text: Checks actor.role === 'CEO' or 'ADMIN' before showing the panel

assertions.evidence: btn-warning on Rebuild Views, btn-primary on Refresh Dashboard

assertions.text: No http:// or https:// URL references (no external CDN)
Shows a spinner or loading indicator while the call is in flight
assertions.evidence: #admin-spinner element toggled via style.display in adminSetBusy()

assertions.text: Renders server response in a status element after the call completes
assertions.evidence: adminSetStatus() sets textContent on #admin-status-msg after withSuccessHandler fires
